note: The terminator sequence  downstream of acrF gene appears to form a weak stem-loop (?G= -11.4 kcal/mol) |CITS:[1720861]|.
This potential stem-loop structure is a pdhR-aceEF terminator or an mRNA processing site.
The putative rho-independent terminator of cmr is predicted to be closed by two A-T base pairings instead and lacks a 3' poly(U) tail in the cmr transcript.

A sequence with characteristics of a rho-independent transcription terminator within 54 bp downstream of the aldB stop codon is not present, although a repeated extragenic palindromic sequence is located 32 bp downstream of the stop codon.
This terminator presents a double stem-loop structure.
